violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, meatloaf was placed hot and covered in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Per PIC, meatloaf was cooked 4 hours ago and was observed at 47 DF. Meatloaf was placed on a sheet pan and put into the freezer to finish cooling. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by various items. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer is not to be used until it is cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

Chicken and American chop suey, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Per PIC, both foods were made yesterday and were observed at 46 DF. Foods were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, potatoes were placed hot and covered in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Potatoes were moved to sheet pans at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by equipment. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
